cards.title: Design onboarding flow
cards.description:
## Onboarding Flow

Design a 3-step wizard for new users:

1. **Welcome screen** — brand intro, value prop
2. **Profile setup** — name, avatar, preferences
3. **First action** — guided task creation

### Requirements
- Progress indicator at top
- Skip option on each step
- Mobile-responsive layout
- Animated transitions between steps

cards.title: Write API documentation
cards.description: Document all REST endpoints using OpenAPI 3.0 spec. Include request/response examples for each endpoint.

cards.title: Set up error tracking
cards.description: Integrate Sentry for error tracking. Configure source maps, set up alert rules for P0 errors.

cards.title: Create email templates
cards.description: Design and implement transactional email templates for: welcome, password reset, invoice, and weekly digest.

cards.title: Optimize image pipeline
cards.description: Set up automatic image resizing and WebP conversion. Target: all uploads under 200KB at 2x resolution.

cards.title: Design settings page
cards.description:
## Settings Page Layout

- **Profile** — name, email, avatar
- **Notifications** — email/push toggles per event type
- **Billing** — plan info, usage, upgrade CTA
- **Team** — member list, invite flow, role management
- **Integrations** — connected services, OAuth tokens

cards.title: Add CSV export for reports
cards.description: Export filtered report data as CSV. Support date range, columns selection, and UTF-8 encoding with BOM for Excel compatibility.

cards.title: Implement auth API
cards.description:
## Auth API Endpoints

### POST /auth/register
- Email + password registration
- Email verification flow
- Rate limiting: 5 attempts per IP per hour

### POST /auth/login
- JWT access token (15min) + refresh token (7d)
- Device fingerprinting for session management

### POST /auth/refresh
- Rotate refresh token on use
- Revoke all tokens on password change

### DELETE /auth/session
- Logout current device or all devices

**Security:** bcrypt with cost=12, CSRF tokens, secure cookie flags

cards.title: Build dashboard widgets
cards.description: Create reusable widget components: metric card, line chart, bar chart, recent activity feed. Use recharts for visualizations.

cards.title: Set up CI/CD pipeline
cards.description: GitHub Actions workflow: lint → test → build → deploy to staging on PR merge. Production deploy on tag push. Include Playwright e2e tests.

cards.title: Create component library
cards.description:
## Component Library

Build foundational UI components:

- **Button** — primary, secondary, ghost, danger variants
- **Input** — text, password, search, textarea
- **Select** — single, multi, searchable
- **Modal** — centered, slide-over
- **Toast** — success, error, info, warning
- **Table** — sortable, filterable, paginated

All components must support keyboard navigation and screen readers.

cards.title: Database migration scripts
cards.description: Write migration scripts for v2 schema. Must be reversible. Test with production data snapshot.

cards.title: Landing page redesign
cards.description: Complete redesign of the landing page with new hero section, feature grid, testimonials, and pricing table. Figma designs approved, implementation complete.

cards.title: Payment integration
cards.description:
## Stripe Integration

- Checkout session for new subscriptions
- Customer portal for plan changes
- Webhook handler for payment events
- Proration on mid-cycle upgrades
- Invoice PDF generation

Test with Stripe test mode. Webhook secret in env vars.

cards.title: Mobile responsive layout
cards.description: Responsive breakpoints at 640px, 768px, 1024px, 1280px. Hamburger menu on mobile. Touch-friendly tap targets (min 44px).

cards.title: Project scaffolding
cards.description: Initial repo setup: monorepo structure, package.json, TypeScript config, ESLint, Prettier.

cards.title: Design system tokens
cards.description: Define color palette, typography scale, spacing system, and shadow tokens in CSS custom properties.

cards.title: User research interviews
cards.description: Conducted 8 user interviews. Key findings: users want keyboard-first navigation, real-time collaboration, and Slack integration.

- Eggs

cards.title: Read 'Designing Data-Intensive Applications'
cards.description: Currently on Chapter 5: Replication. Goal: finish Part II (Distributed Data) by end of month.

cards.title: Prepare talk slides
cards.description:
## Talk: "State Observation for AI Agents"

30-minute slot at local meetup.

### Outline
1. The problem: AI can't see app state
2. Current workarounds (screenshots, DOM scraping)
3. SLOP approach: structured state trees
4. Live demo with kanban board
5. Q&A

Target: 25 slides, 2 live demos

cards.title: Fix leaky kitchen faucet
cards.description: Replacement cartridge ordered from Amazon. Arriving April 2nd. Watch YouTube tutorial before attempting.

cards.title: Renew gym membership
cards.description: Renewed for 12 months at the annual rate. New card on file.
